content: I, Priya Mehta, wife of the deceased Arjun Mehta, residing at Bungalow No. 17, Sector 22, Kharadi, Pune, hereby file this FIR regarding the murder of my husband. On the night of 15th October 2023, at approximately 10:30 PM, I heard a loud scream coming from the backyard of our residence. I immediately rushed out and found my husband lying on the ground with a deep stab wound to his chest. A bloodied kitchen knife was found nearby. There were signs of a struggle — overturned chairs, broken glass, and blood spatter near the kitchen sink. I called 100 immediately. My husband had no enemies, but recently had a bitter dispute over property with his brother Rohan Mehta. I have no knowledge of anyone else being present that night. I have not left the house since returning from evening yoga at 8:00 PM. I am in shock and request immediate investigation. Signed, Priya Mehta.
